allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(p.get\('exports','none'\), indent=2\)\); print\('main:', p.get\('main','none'\)\); print\('peerDeps:', json.dumps\(p.get\('peerDependencies',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next, 'react:', p.dependencies.react\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:p[k] for k in ['main','module','exports','browser'] if k in p}, indent=2\)\)")
